Yes, metals have good electrical and thermal conductivity. This means that metals are able to conduct heat and electricity very efficiently. This property is due to the free electrons present in the metallic structure, which are able to move freely and carry both heat and electric charge.

The missing word in the question is likely "Fiberglass." Fiberglass is a common composite material that consists of glass fibers embedded in a matrix of polymer resin. It is widely used in various applications due to its strength, durability, and lightweight properties.

Metals have good electrical and thermal conductive Ответ
.

Yes, metals have good electrical and thermal conductivity. This means that metals are able to conduct electricity and heat very efficiently. This property is due to the presence of free electrons in the atomic structure of metals, which are able to move freely and carry both heat and electric charge.

Scientists make super-strong spider web silk

A group of researchers from Sweden has unlocked one of nature's biggest secrets. The scientists worked out how spiders make such Ответ
 silk when they spin their spider webs.

Пока нет ответа

In the future, this may allow industrial production of artificial silk for bio-material applications or for the manufacture of advanced textiles." The silk could become an important new material for us in the future.
